i 
 
MASOMPHENYA 
 
Maphunzilo ophindulitsa moyo wonse wamunthu omwe apezeka mosabvuta, opelekedwa 
mopanda tsankho ndiponso opindulitsa kwa munthu molingana ndi mŌĆÖmene maiko ena acitila pa 
dziko lonse lapansi.

ii 
 
UMWINI 
 Umwini wonse ndi otetezedwa. Osalembanso bukuli kapena zigawo zake mnjila ina iliyonse 
popanda cilolezo cocokela kwa eni ake a Curriculum Development Centre.Linasindikizidwa 
koyamba mŌĆÖCinyanja  mu 2025 ndi a Curriculum Development Centre.

MAU OYAMBA 
Kubwela kwa maphunzilo ophindulitsa opatsa maluso ochedwa Competence Based Curriculum 
(CBC) kwabweletsanso sintho pakaphunzilidwe katsopano komanso kothandiza. Maphunzilowa

iv 
 
atsopano ali ndi zophunzitsila zomwe zimapangitsa aphunzi kukhala ndi maluso amakono.  CBC 
iwonetsa ciyambi cotukula maphunzilo komanso kufunikila kwake. 
Buku lophunzitsila Cinyanja fomu 1 lalembedwa mogwilizana ndi mfundo za amaphunzilo 
omwe akufuna kulumikidza maphunzilo ndi umoyo wa tsiku ndi tsiku. Maluso onse omwe 
apelekedwa mŌĆÖbukuli yaonetsa ndondomeko zonse za maphunzilo a 2023 (Curriculum frame 
work) ndi wogwilizana ndi bukuli.  
Colinga ca bukuli ndi kuthandiza aphunzitsi amene aphunzitsa afomu 1 kucilikiza maphunzilo 
atsopano a CBC pamene mabuku ololedwa asanalembedwe. Bukuli likuonetsa kudzipeleka 
kosasunthika kwacigawo ca za maphunzilo kuti nchito ya aphunzitsi ikhale yapafupi, yapeleka 
ndondomeko ya uphungu, nchito zoyeselela ndi mayeso ogwilizana ndi zolinga za CBC. 
Komabe, aphunzitsi alimbikitsidwa kuonjezela zida zophunzitsila kupyolela mŌĆÖkafuku-fuku wao 
kuti athane ndi zosowekela zina zili zonse pomwe agwilitsila nchito CBC. 
Ndikhulupilila kuti aphunzitsi adzagwilitsila nchito buku limeneli moyenela. 
 
Kelvin Mambwe (Dr) 
Permanent Secretary-Education Services 
Ministry of Education

v 
 
CIYAMIKO 
Buku la kuwelenga ndi kulemba mŌĆÖCinyanja yalembwa kupyolela mkugawana nzelu ndi 
kugwilila nchito pamodzi ndi ena. Anthu ambili, zigawo ndi mabungwe anafunsidwa ndi 
kupatsidwa mpata woti apatse maganizo ao pa uthenga womwe unafunikila kukhala mŌĆÖbukuli. 
Mwaici ndifuna kupeleka mathokozo anga kwa anthu, zigawo ndi mabungwe omwe anapeleka 
thandizo la ndalama ndi ukatswili wao kuti buku limeneli lophunzitsila lilembedwe moyenela. 
Awa ndi aphunzitsi a kusekondale, aphunzitsi amasukulu apamwamba kwambili, mabungwe 
oyimilila ziphunzitso (Subject Associations), mabungwe akunja kwa boma ndi mabungwe 
ogwilizana nao. 
 Pomaliza, ndithokodzanso anyanchito a cigawo ca Curriculum Development Centre 
pakutsimikizila kuti nchito yolemba bukuli yamalizidwa moyenela.  
 
Charles K. Ndakala, (Dr.) 
Director Curriculum Development 
Ministry of Education

vii 
 
 
CIYAMBI  
Buku lophunzitsila aphunzi afomu 1 lalembedwa mozama kuti lithandizile aphunzitsi 
kuphunzitsa maphunzio a Cinyanja mogwilizana ndi maphunzilo osinthidwa. Bukuli lalembedwa 
molingana ndi ndondomeko yobvomelezeka ya Cinyanja ya caka ca 2024. Likufuna 
kuwongolela kusiyana komwe kunapangidwa cifukwa ca kusowekela kwa mabuku 
obvomelezeka komanso kupatsa aphunzitsi zida zophunzitsila zothandiza, zocita ndi mayeso 
opangidwa kulingana ndi kalasi la ophunzila ndi zosowekela zao. 
Cigawo ca zamaphunzilo cidziwa zobvuta zomwe zimabwela cifukwa cosintha maphunzilo 
atsopano. Kusankha ndondomeko yamaphunzilo opatsa ana maluso osiyana-siyana (Competence 
Based Curriculum) ndi ciyambi ca kusintha pakupititsa patsogolo maphunzilo ndi kufunikila  
kwake. Bukuli lionetsa kudzipeleka ndi cidwi ca cigawo ca zamaphunzilo kupanga nchito ya 
aphunzitsi kuti ikhale yotheka pakuwapatsa ndondomeko ya uphungu, nchito ndi mayeso omwe 
alunjikidwa ndi ndondomeko ya zolinga za maphunzilo atsopano. Komabe, aphunzitsi 
alimbikitsidwa kuti naonso angathe kuwonjezela pakucita kafuku-fuku wao komanso kupanga 
zida zao zophunzitsila kuti athane ndi zosowekela zina zomwe zingabuke pogwilitsila nchito 
ndondomeko yatsopanoyi.  
Zocita ndi mayeso zomwe zapelekedwa zapangidwa kuti zilimbikitse ndi kukulitsa maluso eni-
eni anchito zamanja ndi maluso oganiza mwakuya mwa aphunzi pomwe akuwonetsa kufunikila 
kwa kugonjela mŌĆÖsintho kumalo amaphunzilo osiyana-siyana.  Aphunzitsi alimbikitsidwa 
kugwilitsila nchito uphungu uyu mŌĆÖmakalasi ao osiyana-siyana ndi kufufuza njila zina zololedwa, 
zobvomelezeka pakafunika kutelo. Kusintha kumeneku ndi kofunikila pakuonetsetsa  kuti 
aphunzi  onse, ocokela kumalo osiyana-siyana  aphindula ndi maphunzilo  abwino atsopanowa. 
Ciyembekezo ndi cakuti bukuli  lidzakhala cida cofunikila kwambili kwa aphunzitsi pomwe 
agwilitsila ndondomeko yamaphunzilo atsopano yochedwa Competence Based Curriculum,  
kukulitsa luso lao lopatsa aphunzi  cidziwitso cokwanila cokhudza Cinyanja, maluso omwe 
angathandize aphunzi kukhala ndi cidwi comwe cingapangitse maphunzilo kukhala aphindu.

viii 
 
 MOGWILITSILA NCHITO BUKULI 
Bukuli lipeleka uthenga womwe uyenela kaphunzitsidwe  mutemu lacitatu la Fomu 1. Bukuli ndi 
logawidwa mzigawo ndipo cigawo ciliconse cili ndi maphunzilo ocokela mŌĆÖzigawo zina 
zosiyana-siyana monga Kumvetsela ndi Kulankhula, kuwelenga, matanthauzo a mau, mvetso, 
ndi kulemba. Uthenga womwe waikidwa mŌĆÖbukuli siunalembedwe mŌĆÖmaphunzilo, koma uyenela 
kugwilitsidwa nchito pa kulemba maphunzilowo (lessons).  Popanga maphunzilo, muyenela 
kutenga uthenga kucokela kuzigawo zosiyana-siyana kupanga phunzilo limodzi. Mwacitsanzo, 
Phunzilo lingakhale ndi kumvetsela ndi kulankhula, matanthauzo a mau, kuwelenga ndi kulemba. 
Polemba phunzilo, muyenela kusankha mfundo zophunzitsa zomwe mudzagogomeza 
mŌĆÖphunzilo ndi nchito zocita aphunzi pa luso lapadela lililonse. Apa zikutanthauza kuti phunzilo 
lidzakhala ndi maluso apadela oposa limodzi. Koma, mphunzitsi adzasankha kuti ndi gawo liti 
lomwe adzagogomezapo mphunzilo lake ndi kuipatsa nthawi yaitali koposa ena. Moonjezela, 
nchito zopatsidwa pa luso lapadela siziyenela kucitidwa zonse mu phunzilo limodzi ai. Zimenezi 
zingacitidwe mŌĆÖmaphunzilo osiyana-siyana.

CA PAMUTU 1: MAKHALIDWE OYENELELA AMŌĆÖDZIKO 
ZamŌĆÖkati: Capamutuci, cidzaona pa makhalidwe oyenela a mŌĆÖdziko kupyolela mu mvetselo ndi 
lankhulo, ndondomeko zakawelengedwe, kulemba, cinenedwe, zikambi-kambi ndi  tembenuzo. 
Komanso nchito ndi zocita aphunzi zidzapelekedwa.  
MVETSELO NDI LANKHULO  
MUTU: KAMBILANO 
Mutu WaungŌĆÖono: Kukambilana 
Lambulo: Pa mutuyu, aphunzi adzakambilana pa mutu wina uli onse wokhudzana ndi 
makhalidwe oyenela a mŌĆÖdziko pakugwilitsila nchito cilankhulo coyenela. 
Luso Lapadela: Kugwilitsila nchito cilankhulo moyenela pakukambilana pa nkhani yokhudzana 
ndi makhalidwe oyenela a mŌĆÖdziko. 
Mau Ofunikila Kudziwa: 
’āś Nzika

’āś cinsinsi

dziko.

Nchito 2: Kukambilana pa zomwe apeza mŌĆÖkambilano lao.

Mwacidule: Pa mutuyu, aphunzi akambilana pa mutu wina uli onse wokhudzana ndi 
makhalidwe oyenela a mŌĆÖdziko pakugwilitsila nchito cilankhulo coyenela.

NKHANI 
NTHANO YA AMAI NAMBALA  
Monga amvula zakale adanena kuti tsoka liyambila kumwendo, momwenso amai Nambala 
kukhala mzice amakumana ndi mabvuto tsiku ndi tsiku. Ukwakwatuke unawasautsa kwambili 
koti cakudya c├Ā ana cinali cosowa cifukwa c├Ā mabvuto a cuma. Komanso codalila pa ulimi okha 
omwe unakumana ndi cilala kamba ka kusintha kwa nyengo ndi kuguga kwa nthaka,.  
     Mwa mwai wanji , kabungwe ka zamalimidwe a tsopano mwa cifundo cao mogwilila nchito 
limodzi ndi boma la Zambia kanayambitsa ndondomeko yatsopano yoona pa ulimi wosamala 
nthaka ndinso kupeleka thandizo la zacuma maka-maka ku anthu a mŌĆÖboma la Msandile, 
kuonetsa umunthu wao. 
    A mai Nambala limodzi ndi a mai anzao anatengako mbali ku maphuzilo monga olima mbeu 
zokula mŌĆÖnthawi ya cilala, njila za malimidwe atsopano komanso pa ubwino wakusamala 
nthaka.Pa maphunzilo yaoyo, anaonetsa kukhala omvetsela ndi kusamala zophunzila 
mosalekelela konse. 
    Ndondomeko ina yoikidwa inali ya kutukulidwa mŌĆÖnzelu zosungilamo ndalama. Magulu 
osunga ndalama anayambitsidwa momwe otengako mbali ankasonkhetsana pangŌĆÖono-pangŌĆÖono 
zomwe mukupita kwa nthawi zinaculuka. A mai amapatsana ngongole kuti agwilitsile nchito pa 
zina ndi zina.  
    A mai Nambala pokula mŌĆÖnzelu ndi maphunzilo atsopanowo pamodzi ndi anzao anayamba 
ulimi umeneu nadalitsika ndi cuma cambili cimene anagawana mwa cilungamo ndi

10 
 
mosazyelelana. Mwa ici mai Nambala anakwanilitsa kugula mbeu nagulitsa,napeza ndalama 
zambili-mbilinso zomwe zinathandizila kutukula banja lao.  
   Nkhani ya kupeza bwino kwa amai Nambala inakhudza amai ambili-mbili mŌĆÖ mudzi mwaomo 
ndipo naonso anagwapo. PangŌĆÖono-pangŌĆÖono anayamba kulima mbeu zolimba ku cilala, 
anacepetsa mikangano pakati pao nacotsapo kuyembekezela abambo mŌĆÖmabanja.  
   Pamene mabanja ambili anayamba kupeza phindu kucokela ku njila za malimidwe 
atsopanowa, boma la Msandile linayamba kusintha. Linakhala la anthu olimbikila pa nchito. Izi 
zinacepetsa umphawi, umbava ndi njilu.

wake anali Timeke . Banjalo linali la akwakwatuke pamene anali kukwatilana. Pa banja laolo 
anaona ana akazi okha-okha asanu. Bamboyo sanauone mtendele popeza anthu ankawaseka kuti 
anali ndi ana akazi cabe ndipo adzasowa opititsa dzina lao patsogolo. Abale ake amamuuza kuti 
amuleke mkazi wakeyo ndikukwatila mkazi oti nŌĆÖkumubalila mwana mwamuna. Amatelo pakuti 
mŌĆÖdelalo, amakhulupilila kuti mwana mwamuna ndiye yekha angatukule banja komanso

analibe phindu ku banja.Koma malingalilo otelowo anali oipa. 
      Bamboyo sanasamale zokamba za anthu ndi abale akewo.Iye anamkondetsetsadi mkazi 
wakeyo ndipo sanafune kumtsudzula cifukwa anakumbukila mwambi wa kuti, ŌĆśmwala

dzina laKe Galamukani. Makolo ao anawapatsa dzinali kamba kakuti anabadwa pa nthawi 
pamene kunali nkhondo ya ciweni-weni. Anthu anali kukonda kufuula ndi mau akuti 
"Galamukani adani afika!" Ndiye pofuna kukumbukila mabvuto amene anali kupitamo makolo 
ao, anawacha dzina limenelo.Mfumuyo inali kulamulilanso nyama zonse zimene 
zimasungidwila pa pulazi lalikulu kwambiri, kotelo kuti kunalibe kuti nyama izi ndi za kuchile 
kapena za kumudzi. Zonse zimakhala pamodzi pa pulazipo. 
Nyama zonse zinali kuthandiza mfumu kugwila nchito zosiyana-siyana. Zinali kupatsidwa 
nchito zogwila kulingana ndi mphamvu komanso nzelu zao. Zinazi zinalikugwila nchito 
yakalavulagaga kumunda.Mwa ici anali kukolola zambili. Ulimi umene anali konda ndi 
ulimi wamthilila.Cifukwa ca ici, maiko amene ankagwedwa njala ankasuma pa 
pulazipo.Nyama zinali kukondana motelo kuti zimagona, kudya,   ndi kucita masewela

83 
 
olikhana pamodzi. Komanso kulelelana ana. Cinali cibwenzi cogwilana manja.Kalulu anali 
kupsela pakhomo ndi kutsuka mbale, cifukwa anali ngati citsekabele wa mfumu. 
 Tsilku lina, nyama zonse zinapita kumilimo, koma mkango unatsalila pa nyumbapo poti 
unali wolema ndi pathupi.Motelo, utacita njala, unadya ana a  njobvu ndi njati cinthu 
comwe cinadabwitsa nyama zina,koma kalulu sanazizwe popeza anazindikila kuti anansi 
ndi nkhondo. Mfumu pomwe inamva izi, mtima wake unatentha kwambili. Telo inauza 
njobvu kuti ipilikitsile kuchile mkango. Koma njobvu inacita makani, motelo mfumu inauza 
njati kutelo.Njatiyo inacita monga mfumu inalamulilila.Koma nyama zinagawanikana 
mŌĆÖmaganizo ndi cigamulo ca mfumuyo. 
 Cifukwa ca ici,papulazipo panauka ciwawa pakati pa nyamazo.Mapeto a ici, nyama zina 
zinatsamuka papulazipo ndi kupita  nkhalango kutali ndi kuyamba kudzikhalila kumeneko 
koma mosagwilizananso.Koma nyama zija zinakhalila pa pulazipo zinapitiliza kukhalilana 
monga mŌĆÖmene zinali kukhalia kale lija. 
Ngakhale nditelo, udani unayamba pakati pa nyama zija zinakhalila papulazipo ndi zija 
zinatsamukila kunkhalango. Ici ndi cifukwa cake nyama zakunkhalango zikamafika papulazi 
paja zinali kuyesedwa adani ndipo zinali kuphedwa.Ndi momwemonso,nyamazo 
zakunkhalango nazonso zimagwila ndi kudya nyama za mŌĆÖmudzi. Nthawi zina nyama za 
mŌĆÖnkhalangozo zimadya za mŌĆÖminda. 
Ili ndilo gwelo la nyama za kuthengo ndi a mudzi.

NTHAKA YATHU 
Nthaka ndi cilengedwe cofunikila kwambili padziko. Anthu atha kupeza umoyo cifukwa ca 
zomwe nthaka imawapatsa. Nyama zamthengo, zomela zosiyana-siyana,mbalame ndi zokwawa 
zones zimapeza cakudya mŌĆÖnthaka.  MŌĆÖnthaka mŌĆÖmamela mitengo yosiyana-siyana.Ndipo 
munthu adapatsidwa danga ndi Nyamalenga kucigwilitsila nchito mŌĆÖnjila zambili. Ku mitengo 
muthu amapezako zipatso, mthunzi ndi zomangilako nyumba. Pamene wina adwala, munthu 
amatengako mankhwala kumitengoko ocilitsila wodwalayo. Nthawi ya cisanu  munthu amatenga 
nkhuni kumitengo yokolezela moto kuti aziotha.Bwino lake nkhuni timagwilitsila nchito 
pakuphikila zakudya. 
Angakhale kuti nthaka imapatsa munthu zabwino tele, zinthu zili kusintha kwambili cifukwa 
munthu sagwilitsila nchito nthakayo mosamala. Cifukwa ca ici, mŌĆÖmalo ena sanduka zipululu. 
Mitengo yonse inadulidwa cifukwa cofunako nkhuni,matabwa ndi makala. Mitengo ya zipatso 
yomwe anthu akale amapezamo zipatso pa nthawi ya njala inatha kudulidwa. Nyama za mthengo 
monga cipembele ndi amnkhwele zasowa cakudya comwe zimadya kale kucokela kumitengo. 
Nyama izi tsopano zikudya mbeu za anthu mŌĆÖminda kapena mŌĆÖmalimba.  
Maonekedwenso anthaka nayo yasinthanso koposa, mŌĆÖmalo momwe munali maiwe tsopano 
muli udzu wokha-okha.Bwino lake mŌĆÖmene munali nyama za mŌĆÖnkhalango mulibe  
zidatsamukila kumalo ena cifukwa cocepekela kwa udzu kumalowo. MŌĆÖmitsinje 
namonso,momwe munali madzi ndi nsomba, inauma. Cifukwa ca ici, ndi cabwino kuti munthu 
azindikile kuti za cilengedwe sizakeyekha ai. Motelo sayenela kusakadza cilengedweci cifukwa 
mphukila za mtsogolo sizidzadziwa zambili zomwe cilengedwe cili naco lelo lino komanso 
atha ukasauka modetsa nkhawa mtsogolomo.
